title: Augmented Weaponry
description: A free weapons plugin consisting of six Custom Weapons, each with unique abilities.
body:
# Augmented Weaponry



The Ultimate Custom Weapons Plugin!

**Augmented Weaponry** adds 6 Custom Weapons to your game, each with a unique Main Ability and Passive Ability.


Perfect for Survival, SMP, PvP, Network hubs, and competitive servers.






## Features



**✔ 6 Custom Weapons**

Each with a unique Passive and Active ability, with matching themes to one of the Structures/Biomes in Vanilla Minecraft.



**✔ Lightweight & Optimized**

Built for performance; no unnecessary overhead.



**✔ Easy Configuration**

Simple YAML config with clear formatting options.






## Weapon Lore and Info



**Reaper Scythe:**


The strongest of all weapons, the Reaper Scythe was forged in the depths of the Nether realm alongside the Soul Reaver. Cursed with dark energy, it strips away life from all living beings that are unfortunate enough to feel its warmth.



**Active Ability (Death Curse):** Upon hitting an enemy, they are inflicted with the Death Curse, which makes them perish regardless of their Armor or Potion effects. The only way to negate the Death Curse is to consume an Enchanted Golden Apple.



**Cooldown:** 1 Day





**Soul Reaver:**



The only weapon strong enough to withstand the dark energy of the Reaper Scythe being forged alongside it, the Soul Reaver is a prison of eternal torment for damned souls. It is capable of converting slain souls back to health and experience for the wielder, a frightening yet functional ability.



**Passive Ability (Dark Harvest):** When an entity is slain, their soul is converted and sent back in the form of +3 health and +5 xp levels for the wielder, up to a maximum of 50 xp levels.



**Passive Ability (Explosive Demise):** If an entity dies within 10 seconds of being hit by the Soul Reaver, its soul collapses hastily, unleashing an AOE explosion that effects nearby enemies in a large radius.



**Cooldown: Passive**





**StormBringer:**


Channeling a fraction of the power of Poseidon, this weapon was one of the gifts to Atlanteans. Originally far weaker, it was lost and forgotten by the receiving warriors, enraging Poseidon and causing him to curse it with his raw fury to unleash its full might.



**Active Ability (Sky Fury):** When unleashed, it summons lightning bolts on all enemies around the Wielder, forcing them back and displaying the eternal curse of the weapon.



**Passive Ability (Shield of Atlantis):** The weapon protects its Wielder by giving them permanent Resistance II, as long as their hands clasp it.



**Cooldown:** 1 minute





**Gravity Shifter:**

One of Dr. Geros most destructive creations, the Gravity Shifter is a weapon straight out of science fiction. The force of this weapon is enough to anchor an enemy in place, removing their ability to jump and run for a fixed amount of time.



**Active Ability (Mighty Anchor):** Upon striking, the enemy loses the ability to jump and is slowed for a specified time period.



**Cooldown:** 1 minute





**Blink Blade:**

Forged by the last Ender Queen, the Blink Blade captures the elusive power of the Endermen, turning its Wielder into a shadow of the void. It was far stronger than the Reaper Scythe a long time ago, but after the collapse of the Ender kingdom, it lost most of its power to the invading faction.



**Active Ability (Enderport):** Upon striking, the wielder has a 30% chance to teleport behind the enemy, catching them off guard and giving the wielder the upper hand.



**Passive Ability (Void Dash):** The wielder's speed is greatly boosted while holding this weapon, as they obtain the Speed II effect.



**Cooldown:** Passive





**Cursed Dagger:**

The weapon of endless curses, stained with the blood of the last Aztec Emperor. Forged deep inside the Jungles of Regenhaim, it has seen the darkest mysteries unfold infront of it.



**Active Ability (Cursed Strike):** A hit delivers the poison effect to the victim, bathing them in the venom of Dàkuit, along with a chance to blind the enemy for 5 seconds.



**Cooldown:** 1 minute




## Commands


**Main command and Alias:**

/augmentedweaponry

/ag



**Sub-commands:**

/ag:giveweapon <weaponname> - Give yourself a weapon

/ag:reload - Reload the Plugin

/ag:weaponinfo <weaponname> - View info about a Weapon

/ag:weaponrecipe <weaponname> - View crafting recipe for a Weapon

/ag:weapons - List of all Weapons






## Why Augmented Weaponry?


Augmented Weaponry aims to keep the simplistic style of Vanilla Minecraft while still adding a custom twist to Weapons! Most (or all) abilities are Vanilla oriented - meaning they use Vanilla features to customize weaponry.


It also provides optimizations for maximum Server performance!






## Compatibility


1.16 – 1.21+
Spigot
Paper
Purpur


(Works on most modern forks)


**Consider joining our Discord:** https://discord.com/invite/FQqnur9cG2
